title: Renovations for the new Masjid
customText: Allahu Akbar! By Allahs ultimate mercy and your incredible generosity, trust, and duas, we have reached our $1.6 million Phase 1 target and secured the building, Alhamdulillah! We are now launching Phase 2: A $400,000 Renovation Fund. Every dollar raised from now until our April 18 deadline will go directly toward renovating and beautifying our new 11,400 sq ft home, ensuring the space is stunning and completely ready for worship when our community walks through the doors, InshaAllah.
